agents.name: Planner
agents.lastMessage: Introducing aromatic residues at position 5 and 6 will enhance binding affinity

report.hypothesis: Introducing aromatic residues at position 5 and 6 will enhance binding affinity through hydrophobic interactions, while increasing hydrophobicity at position 11 will improve van der Waals contacts in the binding pocket.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: Structural instability (pLDDT=0.0) and poor docking (dock=0.00) dominate failure

report.hypothesis: Structural instability (pLDDT=0.0) and poor docking (dock=0.00) dominate failures, suggesting need for improved template-based modeling or loop refinement. ddG threshold may be overly stringent for early screening.

proposed_changes.rationale: All failed candidates have ddG < -8.0, suggesting the threshold is too restrictive. Lowering to -5.0 allows more candidates with moderate stability.
Only 8 candidates were generated, insufficient to explore the design space given high failure rates. Increasing to 12 provides better sampling.
